g.title: actor.usr_standing_penalty:org_unit->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (org_unit) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.usr_standing_penalty:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.usr_standing_penalty:staff->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (staff) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.usr_standing_penalty:standing_penalty->config.standing_penalty:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (standing_penalty) REFERENCES config.standing_penalty(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
